title: funastrum schottii
intro: Funastrum schottii, also known as Devil's Claw or Grapple Plant, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. The plant's roots have been traditionally used in medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and analgesic effects. The health benefits associated with Funastrum schottii include relief from arthritis, gout, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as aiding in digestion and reducing fever. Funastrum schottii is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
